arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News: Albert Sambi Lokonga announces summer exit plan
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Albert Sambi Lokonga has announced his intention to stay at loan club Sevilla permanently. Lokonga has found a home in southern Spain and given his non-existent role at Arsenal, he is determined to leave the Gunners in the summer.

arts.ttl: EFL release statement after controversial Newcastle vs Arsenal decision
arts.sum: This incident marked only the second time in English football history that a referee has addressed the stadium crowd directly, following Stuart Atwell's precedent-setting move during Liverpool's 1-0 loss to Tottenham last month. "VAR checked and determined that he was in an offside position and recommended that the goal was disallowed."

arts.ttl: Gabriel Martinelli forced off with injury as Arsenal rocked by another forward blow
arts.sum: Arsenal had plenty of work to do in their Carabao Cup semi-final against Newcastle to advance but they now have a fresh injury issue to contend with after Gabriel Martinelli was forced off

arts.ttl: Gary Neville left in stitches as football fans poke fun at referee Simon Hooper having to tell Newcastle fans why VAR ruled out Alexander Isak goal
arts.sum: Eddie Howe 's side welcomed the Gunners to St James' Park on Wednesday night for the second-leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie.

arts.ttl: Report: Eddie Howe eyed these two positions for January transfer window
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe had his sights set on signing a right winger and a centre-back in the January transfer window, according to reports. Outlet Football Insider has claimed that the former Bournemouth man did want new additions. arts.ttl: Cheick Tiote's son included as Newcastle mascot for Carabao Cup semi-final on the 14th anniversary of his late father's famous goal in a 4-4 draw against Arsenal
arts.sum: Tiote memorably scored a stunning, 30-yard volley to complete one of the great Premier League comebacks, coming from 4-0 down at half-time against Arsenal to draw 4-4 back in 2011.

arts.ttl: “Just get on with business” – Collymore slams Arsenal for petty juvenile behaviour
arts.sum: Arsenal’s on-pitch behaviour against Man City may have got the thumbs up from the youngsters, but Stan Collymore has slammed the Gunners. Myles Lewis-Skelly was sent off against Wolves recently, but it was his antics when scoring in the game against the reigning champions that garnered as many column inches. arts.ttl: Lloyd Kelly Embraces New Challenge at Juventus
arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly, the latest addition to Juventus' defensive lineup, has expressed his enthusiasm about joining the Italian giants. The English defender, who completed his move from Newcastle United on deadline day, is eager to make his mark in Serie A. arts.ttl: Report: Four players Newcastle can sign for free after deadline day
arts.sum: Newcastle United had a quiet January transfer window, bringing in no signings, but that doesn’t necessarily mean their business is done just yet. Despite being linked with several players, the Magpies didn’t bring in any new signings before the window shut. arts.ttl: Is there VAR for Newcastle United vs Arsenal? Carabao Cup semi-final rules confirmed
arts.sum: Newcastle United will be bidding to reach the Carabao Cup final for the second time in three seasons this evening when they host Arsenal at St James' Park.
